LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.Messa: {0} has adapted to the decoy's frequency. We must initiate fresh research to find alternative.
LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.Place: Place a decoy speedometer into the obelisk.
Insert a specially designed device that simulates the speedometer's chrono-effect frequency into the obelisk's socket.
Research to find decoy's frequency not finished.
